Maritime Decarbonization Monthly
June 2022
Thought of the
"Shipping could be moving towards net-zero by 2050"
Month:
The Big Picture
The recent and much-anticipated meeting of the Marine Environmental Protection Committee,
which held its 78th session June 6-10th (MEPC 78), underlined that sufficient momentum and
support exists among most member states for the IMO to begin setting more ambitious targets
and policies at upcoming IMO meetings. The focus was to progress IMO policy to build an effective
greenhouse gas emissions (GHG) reduction strategy to be approved at MEPC 80 in 2023. Another notable aspect of MEPC 78 was the rejection of a proposal led by the International
Chamber of Shipping (ICS) for a $5bn decarbonization research and development fund that would
have provided a market-based
